evidence_summary: Demonstrate the mechanical utility of the tin_woodman to resolve a physical blockade. The sequence must transition from high-tension environmental aggression to a stabilized, cleared pathway through the fighting_forest.
The Tin Woodman uses his axe to hack through the aggressive branches, carving a path for the group. They realize the trees are only aggressive at the perimeter/first row.
Group trapped by encroaching, moving branches in a state of panic.
Group standing in a stabilized clearing with visible debris from the path.
tin_woodman hacks through aggressive foliage to open a corridor.
